message:
bd-ml2r.10.3: implement fallback ladder and strict-mode behavior

Add fallback ladder infrastructure for deterministic FNX degradation:

- FallbackLevel: ordered enum (Full > Partial > Disabled > Failed)
- FallbackReason: structured reasons with diagnostic messages
- FallbackMode: graceful (default), strict (fail), warn (log + continue)
- FallbackDecision: encapsulates level + reason for provenance
- apply_fallback_policy: enforces mode, returns FallbackError in strict

Key design choices:
- Levels are ordered so comparisons indicate quality degradation
- All decisions produce structured log entries for telemetry
- Strict mode returns typed error instead of panicking
- FromStr trait on FallbackMode for CLI/config parsing

11 new tests for fallback ladder (22 total in module).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
